name: Datprof
description: Datprof — Test data management platform for provisioning, masking, and virtualizing database subsets for testing.

seo.title: Datprof — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Datprof: Datprof — Test data management platform for provisioning, masking, and virtualizing database subsets for testing.

when_to_use: Provision masked database subsets for dev environments
Virtualize production data for parallel test execution
GDPR-compliant PII masking for test data pipelines
Refresh test databases with production-like data on demand

pros: Fast subset and virtualization for test databases
Built-in masking keeps PII out of lower environments
Handles complex relational integrity across subsets
Self-service provisioning for dev and QA
cons: Niche vendor, smaller community and ecosystem
Enterprise-only pricing, not for small teams
Setup against legacy schemas takes real effort
review.verdict: Credible Delphix alternative for test data management on relational stacks, best for regulated orgs.
review.best_for: Enterprises needing masked, referentially-intact test DBs from production
review.not_for: Cloud-first teams preferring synthetic data or ephemeral branches

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
